notify.dailyBody: Tonight's reading is ready — answer your daily question to keep your streak alive.
notify.streakBody: You haven't answered today's question yet. Answer before midnight to keep your streak.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Choose a module. Enter the people in your life. Get a powerful reading in under 3 minutes.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Attachment theory, sociometry, love languages, color psychology — all decoded for you.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: You start with 5 Stars. Spend them on readings. Earn more every day — or watch a short ad.
onboarding.cardAttachmentQuestion: Who shows up when you go quiet?
onboarding.cardSociometryQuestion: Who do you turn to for advice?

home.heroTitle: What do you want to discover?

who_loves_me.title: Who Loves Me
who_loves_me.subtitle: Who truly has your back
who_loves_me.description: Twenty questions rooted in attachment theory reveal who in your life loves you most — and how.

who_hates_me.title: Who Resents Me
who_hates_me.subtitle: Hidden friction, revealed
who_hates_me.description: Sociometric analysis of who in your orbit is carrying negative energy or resentment toward you — even when they smile.

who_jealous.title: Who's Jealous of Me
who_jealous.subtitle: Envy you can't see
who_jealous.description: Envy often wears the mask of friendship. This reading surfaces who is competing with you behind your back.

who_soulmate.title: Who's My Soulmate
who_soulmate.subtitle: Find your frequency match
who_soulmate.description: A love-languages reading that surfaces who you're most deeply aligned with — the person whose presence feels like resonance, not effort.

who_admires.title: Who Secretly Admires Me
who_admires.subtitle: The quiet admirers
who_admires.description: An intuition-based reading that reveals who carries quiet admiration for you — the attention, warmth, and longing they keep just below the surface.

who_cut_off.title: Who's Pulling Away
who_cut_off.subtitle: Spot the drift early
who_cut_off.description: When someone withdraws, it says something. This reading maps who is emotionally disconnecting — and why.

energy_reading.title: Energy Reading
energy_reading.subtitle: Read the room's frequency
energy_reading.description: A color-wheel based reading that identifies whose energy is most aligned with yours — and who drains you.

attachment_style.title: Attachment Style
attachment_style.subtitle: How you bond, decoded
attachment_style.description: Based on decades of research, your attachment style shapes every relationship you have. Find out yours.

aura_color.title: Aura Color
aura_color.subtitle: The color your energy wears
aura_color.description: Your energy has a color — it enters rooms before you do. 20 questions reveal which one you've been glowing all along.

am_i_problem.title: Am I The Problem?
am_i_problem.subtitle: An honest mirror
am_i_problem.description: Sometimes the pattern is us. This reading helps you see your relational blind spots with compassion and clarity.

who_will_hurt_me.title: Who Will Hurt Me?
who_will_hurt_me.subtitle: Read the warning signs early
who_will_hurt_me.description: Sociometric analysis of the trust-risk patterns in your circle — leaked confidences, kept score, tested boundaries — and who carries them.

red_green_flag.title: Red Flag or Green Flag?
red_green_flag.subtitle: Read the pattern, not the promise
red_green_flag.description: Twenty behavioural questions across consistency, boundaries, honesty, repair and control. Read one person for a straight verdict — or read your whole circle to find the reddest flag in it.

shadow_self.title: Shadow Self
shadow_self.subtitle: Meet the side you hide
shadow_self.description: Twenty questions built on Jungian shadow work reveal how much of your hidden side you own — and how much still speaks through you unnoticed.

readingModes.heading: How many people are you reading?

themeGallery.title: Themes
themeGallery.cosmicDesc: Violet nebulae and starlight — the signature Aurafy night sky.
themeGallery.desertOracleDesc: Dusk over warm dunes — terracotta, amber and drifting sand.
themeGallery.elvenGroveDesc: A moonlit elven grove — deep emerald, teal light and old gold.

about.title: The psychology behind Aurafy
about.subtitle: The mystical language is a metaphor. The engine underneath is evidence-based.
about.footer: Aurafy for self-reflection and entertainment. Not a clinical diagnostic tool.
about.attachmentBody: Bowlby and Ainsworth showed that the bonds we form as children become the blueprint for how we love as adults. Aurafy reads the behaviors — closeness, reassurance, distance — that reveal that blueprint.
about.sociometryBody: Jacob Moreno mapped the invisible currents of attraction and tension inside any group. Those same currents — who admires, who resents, who pulls away — shape your everyday relationships.
about.loveLanguagesBody: Gary Chapman described five ways people give and receive affection. Knowing which language someone speaks explains why love can feel loud to one person and silent to another.
about.colorBody: Colors carry consistent emotional associations across cultures — warmth, calm, intensity. Aurafy borrows that vocabulary to describe the energy each person brings into a room.

insights.title: Insights
insights.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for a new insight

weekly.bonusSubtitle: Seven nights, unbroken. Your balance is now {{balance}} ✦.
